textByHashes.dfaaa48d6857d0f02b9b0a3f135cfb6a243012dc: It leads to the caves beneath this part of the island. I think there's dragons at the other end; you can hear the noises and smell the smoke coming up the passage.
textByHashes.61ca44689917b71dbdf042234e8b4ef07ce8f55a: Eh, I could sort something out for you. Thing is, my brother's got a job guarding the main entrance to the caves. I'd be undercutting him if I let people go down this hole.
textByHashes.78538717b37a5a32a62b0a2414f0e123113516b2: No, it means I'd need something to assuage my conscience after betraying my brother. 5,000 trading sticks ought to cheer me up nicely.
textByHashes.e3c677965b4b06f0ecb989513f980bdb6a61f9d6: Yes, you've paid, you can climb down there whenever you like. Go, go.
textByHashes.5c320e582b10c0cabc91b8a809d63bb9e83ec792: Ever seen a toilet around here?
textByHashes.3c744fca29e19e03746e027a454db065b217bab3: Hey, I didn't say you could do that!
textByHashes.384559bf80e6b6a7d68f5562f5f34ef71c638262: Either go down it or don't go down it, but stop messing around with it!
